← Work

Stone Majlis

Interiors · Riyadh · 2024 Concept study

The majlis is the heart of the Saudi home. Here it is reimagined in a quiet language: few honest materials, long low seating, and light that honours the guest without excess.

Location
Riyadh
Year
2024
Category
Interiors
Status
Concept study
Services
Interior direction · Materials & furnishing guidance

The ground floor is reorganised around a clear hospitality axis: an independent guest entrance, parallel men's and family majlis spaces, and a rear service corridor that protects the family's full privacy.

Walls are local sandstone with a soft finish, ceilings a quiet timber, and lighting is concealed within the architecture rather than hung from it. Luxury here lives in texture and proportion, not ornament.

The images above are atmosphere and material references by Unsplash photographers, part of a temporary sample presentation. Image credits.
